context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements a Rails engine install generator using Rails::Generators::Base, Rails::Generators::Migration, copy_file, migration_template, route, and say — following the rails-engine-installers skill.

checklist.name: Inherits from Rails::Generators::Base
checklist.description: The generator class inherits from Rails::Generators::Base

checklist.name: Includes Rails::Generators::Migration
checklist.description: The generator includes Rails::Generators::Migration to support migration_template

checklist.name: self.next_migration_number implemented
checklist.description: The generator implements self.next_migration_number correctly (typically using Time.now.utc.strftime or ActiveRecord::Generators::Base pattern)

checklist.name: copy_file for initializer
checklist.description: The generator uses copy_file to install the initializer into config/initializers/analytics_suite.rb

checklist.name: migration_template for migration
checklist.description: The generator uses migration_template to copy create_analytics_events.rb into db/migrate/ with a timestamped filename

checklist.name: route injection
checklist.description: The generator calls route('mount AnalyticsSuite::Engine => "/analytics"') or equivalent to add the mount to config/routes.rb

checklist.name: say post-install message
checklist.description: The generator ends with a say call that prints post-install instructions (e.g. how to set ANALYTICS_SUITE_KEY)

checklist.name: template file present
checklist.description: The initializer template exists in lib/generators/analytics_suite/install/templates/ (or the install dir)

checklist.name: frozen_string_literal
checklist.description: All Ruby files produced include # frozen_string_literal: true

checklist.name: Namespace correct
checklist.description: The generator class is named AnalyticsSuite::InstallGenerator and is within the AnalyticsSuite namespace
